requirements.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
requirements.description: Global enforces MFA for all BPO-side administrative access.

requirements.title: Vulnerability Scanning Frequency
requirements.description: Automated scans must run every 24 hours on all public endpoints.

requirements.title: Incident Response Plan (IRP) Activation
requirements.description: BPO must demonstrate a tested IRP within the last quarter.
